name: Session Runtime
summary: Swift session orchestration around SessionRunner, transcript normalization, app-safe session state, and mediated handoff to AACI and MSR.
invariants: Session Runtime owns session orchestration and transcript normalization.
MSR starts after normalized transcript input and owns ASL, VDLP, and GEM only.
Session Runtime consumes Core law; it does not become Core law.
Session surfaces remain scaffold/app-safe and non-authorizing.
allowedWork: Maintain SessionRunner ordering and first-slice orchestration evidence.
Maintain transcript normalization as a Session Runtime stage.
Wire app adapters to mediated session state without adding app authority.
Run CLI and app smoke paths after session behavior changes.
forbiddenWork: Make Session Runtime a Core-law authority.
Add clinical, regulatory, or provider authority to session orchestration.
Conflate Swift Session Runtime with TypeScript Async Runtime or Service Runtime.
knownGaps: Veridia and CloudClinic session wiring remain product tasks, not ST-011 work.
Final app UI shells are not implemented.
notes: Use the current name HealthOSSessionRuntime in implementation references.
Territory metadata does not change runtime ordering.
